data.title: Price of SUI hovers around $0.92, facing resistance at $1.00 despite mixed indicators.Support at $0.89 key for next move.
data.description: The stock of SUI is currently trading at $0.92 displaying bearish momentum, even though the Relative Strength Index (RSI) remains neutral. Based on technical analysis, there is a possibility of a challenge towards the $0.96 resistance level. The crucial support level stands at $0.89, which will influence the direction of the next significant movement in the stock price.

data.title: Price forecast for OP: $0.12 short-term, $0.12-$0.14 mid-term with bullish breakout at $0.14 by April 2026. Support at $0.10.
data.description: The forecast for OP price predicts a short-term target of $0.12 within a week. Looking ahead, the medium-term forecast for OP is in the range of $0.12 to $0.14 over the next month. A bullish breakout is anticipated if the price reaches $0.14. On the downside, a critical support level stands at $0.10. These projections are based on current market trends and analysis.

data.title: MetaComp unveils Web2.5 VisionX Engine and AgentX, Advancing the StableX Network as the Compliance Layer for Agentic Payment and Wealth (1)
data.description: The adoption of StableX Network's compliance and execution layer, powered by the Web2.5 VisionX Engine and AgentX, establishes it as a fundamental platform for institutional artificial intelligence within the financial services sector. The Web2.5 VisionX Engine comprises a sophisticated three-layer architecture focused on anti-money laundering and combating the financing of terrorism. It addresses identity verification, behavioral analysis, and network risk assessment, offering a comprehensive solution for financial institutions.

data.title: Nonprofits Choose ezCheckprinting and Virtual Printer Combo For Best Compatibility with Latest QB Versions
data.description: Halfpricesoft.com has introduced a new solution for nonprofits utilizing QuickBooks and virtual printer technology, offering worry-free blank check printing. This development allows nonprofit organizations to enhance their payment processing with improved confidence and efficiency. Interested users can download and test this new feature today. The announcement was made on March 27, 2026, in REDMOND, Wash. This initiative aims to streamline operations for nonprofits and ensure a seamless check printing experience.

data.title: The Rise of 'New-Collar' Hiring: Experience Overtakes Degrees, SOFTSWISS-Pentasia Report Shows
data.description: In Valletta, Malta, a recent report by global iGaming software provider, SOFTSWISS, and recruitment consultancy Pentasia, reveals that companies are scaling back on hiring, focusing more on performance over academic qualifications. The report indicates a decline in the recruitment rate, with companies showing more preference for proven track records. This shift in priorities is reflected in the hiring practices across various industries. The findings underscore a trend towards valuing experience and achievements in prospective candidates. This change signifies a move away from traditional metrics like educational background towards a more results-driven approach in the recruitment process. The report sheds light on the growing importance of practical skills and accomplishments in today's job market, with numbers indicating a noticeable shift in hiring strategies.

data.title: India Payment Gateways Market Set to Expand at 9.69% CAGR by 2032, Led by Real-Time Payments and Digital Commerce Growth, Says MarkNtel Advisors
data.description: A recently published market study by MarkNtel Advisors revealed that the India Payment Gateways Market is expected to experience a steady growth, with a projected CAGR of approximately 9.69% between 2026 and 2032. This growth is largely attributed to the increasing acceptance of digital payment methods across the country.

data.title: Arbitrum (ARB) price may hit $0.12 by April 2026 if critical support at $0.09 holds amid bearish trend.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Arbitrum (ARB) is currently priced at $0.09 amidst a downturn in the market. However, technical analysis indicates a possible bullish trend that could push the price up to $0.12 in the near future. This forecast is contingent on crucial support levels being maintained over the next few weeks.

data.title: European DataWarehouse Claims Its First “Fintech Provider of the Year” Award and a Sixth “Data Provider of the Year” Title at GlobalCapital’s 2026 European Securitisation Awards
data.description: In a recent event in London, European DataWarehouse (EDW) was honored with two prestigious awards, being named the “Data Provider of the Year” and “Fintech Provider of the Year” at the 2026 GlobalCapital European Securitization Awards. These awards celebrate outstanding accomplishments in European structured finance. Industry peers participated in the selection process through a popular vote. GlobalCapital defined the awards program as a platform to acknowledge the top performers in the market. The recognition from GlobalCapital emphasizes the exceptional performance of EDW in the industry.

data.title: DoGo Power Showcased its GFM Smart PV&ESS Solution in South Africa
data.description: On March 25th to 27th, 2026, DoGo Power introduced its innovative GFM Smart PV&ESS Solution at the SOLAR & STORAGE LIVE AFRICA 2026 event in Johannesburg. The showcased C&I GFM Smart PV&ESS Solution by DoGo Power focuses on active safety and performance. This offering aims to provide reliable and efficient energy solutions with a strong emphasis on safety.

data.title: Notice of Annual General Meeting in Swedish Orphan Biovitrum AB (publ)
data.description: On March 27, 2026, Swedish Orphan Biovitrum AB (Sobi®) announced the summoning of its shareholders (Reg. No. 556038-9321) to the Annual General Meeting scheduled for May 6, 2026, at 10:00 am. The meeting will take place at IVA Konferenscenter on Grev Turegatan 16 in Stockholm. Shareholders are requested to attend the meeting which will address important matters concerning the company's performance and future strategies.
